name: EazyDiner IndusInd Bank Platinum Credit Card

milestoneBenefits: 2,000 bonus Reward Points (worth Rs 400) upon spending Rs 30,000 every 90 days (dining spends excluded)
additionalBenefits: Two complimentary movie tickets every month on BookMyShow (each ticket worth up to Rs 200)

additionalDetails: Dining discount of 20% up to Rs 500 is capped at 3 transactions per calendar month and is only applicable when paying through PayEazy on the EazyDiner app
1 Reward Point = Rs 0.20 when redeemed against restaurant bills via PayEazy on the EazyDiner app

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-27
Extra 20% discount is auto-applied and only applicable when booking and paying through the EazyDiner App via PayEazy. Not applicable for physical card payments, other cards, UPI, or wallets.
Extra 20% discount is not applicable if consecutive transactions are made at the same restaurant within 120 minutes or less.
Milestone benefit of 2,000 Reward Points requires Rs 30,000 spent every 90 days, excluding dining spends.
Comprehensive insurance cover against unauthorized transactions up to 48 hours prior to reporting card loss
